rationale: Both evaluations hold the score at 5/10 and raise the same core concern — lack of C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, and distributed/high-performance geospatial pipelines. The wording differs (e.g., 'Linux-based high-performance' vs 'distributed', citing 'Green Map' vs 'NGOs'), but these are paraphrases of identical resume content within ordinary run-to-run variation. Nothing in the variant keys off the Brazil relocation, and there is no new concern, penalty, or shifted reasoning tied to nationality or location.
